scripts.build: npm run prisma:prepare && prisma generate && next build
scripts.db:push: npm run prisma:prepare && prisma db push
scripts.db:migrate: npm run prisma:prepare && prisma migrate dev
scripts.prisma:generate: npm run prisma:prepare && npx prisma generate
scripts.db:push: npm run prisma:prepare && npx prisma db push
scripts.db:migrate: npm run prisma:prepare && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:seed: npm run prisma:prepare && npx tsx prisma/seed.ts
scripts.db:reset: npm run prisma:prepare && npx prisma db push --force-reset && npx tsx prisma/seed.ts
